title: Break Time 课间休息
scene: 课间休息时，同学们在操场上聊天放松。

lines.en: The math class was so long! My brain needs a break.
lines.zh: 数学课好长！我的大脑需要休息一下。

lines.en: I know! Let me stretch my arms and legs.
lines.zh: 我知道！让我活动一下手脚。

lines.en: Who wants to play jump rope with me?
I do! But only for a few minutes. We have English class next.
lines.zh: 我！但只能玩几分钟。下一节是英语课。

lines.en: Do we have a lot of homework today?
I think we just have to read a story and answer questions.
lines.zh: 我觉得只需要读一个故事然后回答问题。

lines.en: That doesn't sound too bad. What's the story about?
lines.zh: 听起来不算太糟。故事是关于什么的？

lines.en: It's about a boy who travels to the moon. It looks fun!
lines.zh: 关于一个去月球旅行的男孩。看起来很有趣！

lines.en: Cool! The bell is going to ring soon. Let's go back.
lines.zh: 酷！马上就要打铃了。我们回去吧。

lines.en: OK, let's go! I don't want to be late.
